title: Looking for Teacher at Amity University Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Amity University Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Amity University Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Amity University Advisory Limited:
Amity University Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University Advisory Limited!
